title: Easy Creative Enchanting
description: This mod adds a creative only enchantment panel to the right side of the anvil menu. Makes it easier to enchant without having to search up each individual enchantment book.
body:
### Ever felt like adding enchants to armour was slow while in creative? 



This mod adds a creative only enchantment panel to the right side of the anvil menu.

The scrolling gui showcases all possible enchants for that item allowing you to add enchantment levels onto your armour or tools easily without having to search up each enchantment book in the creative menu.

You can also hide the ui, change its organization, and hide/show cursed enchantments.

**NOTE: this is in beta mode, if you have any ideas or bug reports for the mod you would like to share I would love to hear them! I would also like to note that this is only available for people who are in the creative gamemode.**
